## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic alignment and planning for Sunbit's content SEO initiative with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on upper and mid-funnel content for dental and auto repair topics, balancing brand awareness with conversion potential](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Initial content creation to include cost-related articles (e.g., clear aligners) and top-of-funnel pieces, with careful legal review](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Technical SEO foundation is strong, with minor improvements identified for site speed and indexing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Backlink strategy leveraging merchant partnerships is effective, with potential for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Keyword Research

  - [Developed extensive keyword research for dental and auto repair clusters](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Prioritized upper-funnel content to build brand awareness, differentiating from competitors' lower-funnel focus](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Identified opportunity for merchant-facing content (e.g., running a dental practice, auto service center management)](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Plan to use CTAs linking to Sunbit's shop directory, enhancing merchant value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Will start with two articles on clear aligners (cost-focused and top-of-funnel) for calibration and legal review](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Aim to scale quickly after initial approval, moving cluster by cluster in weeks 3-5](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Content will be delivered in batches for easier review and publication](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Careful approach to cost-related content, using ranges and multiple sources for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Technical SEO Audit

  - [Overall strong technical foundation with minimal errors](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Areas for improvement:](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) optimization for better site speed](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [Adding redirects for \~50 404 errors](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [Considering selective indexing of partner/location pages for potential long-tail traffic](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Current strategy leveraging merchant partnerships is effective](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Each new merchant adds a backlink to their Sunbit pre-qualification page](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [PR efforts contribute to backlink profile, though many are behind paywalls](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

### Collaboration and Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send weekly plans and content deliverables through established channel](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Potential collaboration with Sunbit's web agency (Adora Digital) on technical SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Ongoing discussions needed for indexing strategy of partner/location pages](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to send examples of desired merchant-facing content topics](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX to create two initial articles on clear aligners (cost and top-of-funnel)](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Team to align on content structure and messaging in calibration phase](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Explore potential tweaks to current backlink strategy for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up on indexing strategy for partner/location pages](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [GrowthX to map out content plan for weeks 3-4 as production scales up](https://fathom.video/share/MetPSgYB-1ghmxW1USFEwUmssbxsUhaz?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
